basic_details.job_title: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Yoga Teacher, Instructor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya
basic_details.post_name: Yoga Teacher, Instructor and More Posts

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/Diploma/Post Graduation in Yoga, B.P.Ed./M.P.Ed. with sports specialization, Recognized certification in Self-Defense/Martial Arts, B.Tech/M.Tech in Robotics/Electronics/Mechanical Engineering, Knowledge & experience in IKS, Graduation/Diploma in Classical Dance, Graduation/Diploma in Musical Instrument (Guitar)
qualification.details: Yoga Teacher (preferably female): Degree/Diploma/Post Graduation in Yoga from a recognized institution. Badminton: B.P.Ed./M.P.Ed. from a recognized institution with specialization and/or coaching experience in the concerned sport. Football: B.P.Ed./M.P.Ed. from a recognized institution with specialization and/or coaching experience in the concerned sport. Self Defense coach/trainer for girls (Female): Recognized certification/training in Self-Defense/Martial Arts with experience in training school girls. Atal Tinkering Lab Facilitator: B.Tech/M.Tech in Robotics/Electronics/Mechanical Engineering or related discipline from an AICTE-recognized institution. Indian Knowledge System (IKS) Resource Person: Resource Person having knowledge & experience in IKS and experience in conducting educational sessions for school students of Classes VI-VIII. Classical Dance Instructor: Graduation/Diploma in the relevant field from recognized institution. Experience as instructor will be preferred. Musical Instrument Instructor (Guitar): Graduation/Diploma in the relevant field from recognized institution. Experience as instructor will be preferred.

all_official_links.label: Download PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya?
faq.answer: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya has announced a total of 8 vacancies for the posts of Resource Persons and Coaches.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 29 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications vary by post and include degrees/diplomas in Yoga, B.P.Ed./M.P.Ed., certifications in Self-Defense/Martial Arts, B.Tech/M.Tech in engineering disciplines, knowledge in IKS, and diplomas in Classical Dance or Musical Instruments (Guitar).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC category candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the SC/ST category candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and a Demonstration/Practical Test.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Niangbari, Ri-Bhoi, Meghalaya.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity.
